input.background: Imagine a study of six monkeys that compares two treatments. Group 1 receives Monkey Tonic while group 2 receives Applied Monkey Training (AMT). Table lists results performance scores BEFORE and AFTER these interventions.
input.question: Within group 2 (individuals 4 through 6), calculate changes in scores (AFTER minus BEFORE). What is the mean difference in these scores?

output.answer: The mean change in group 2 is equal to 1. This mean difference is based on paired samples.

GROUP.description: Group assignment: 1 represents Monkey Tonic, 2 represents Applied Monkey Training (AMT).

CHANGE_GROUP_2.description: Changes in performance scores (AFTER minus BEFORE) for individuals in group 2 (ID 4, 5, 6).

MEAN_DIFFERENCE_GROUP_2.description: Mean difference in performance scores (AFTER minus BEFORE) for individuals in group 2.
